titles.title: But If There Is No God

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There are those who live around us Who say God does not exist They claim I can’t feel His presence In my heart he does not live

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: But so if there is no God Then explain the mountains If there is no God Then explain the sea Tell me there’s no higher power Then I’ll tell you what Jesus did for me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He took upon Himself my sorrow He took my old desires away He placed my feet On a rock that’s stable He lives and reigns He is alive today
